cases.input_text: Research the receipts, plan the fix, then write the explanation for operators.
cases.notes: Mixed research, planning, and writing should favor a routed specialist chain.

cases.input_text: Design the architecture and then critique the rollback path before release.
cases.notes: Planning plus critique should beat a single generalist.

cases.input_text: Audit the law, verify fail-closed behavior, and summarize the governed result.
cases.notes: Governance plus writing should prefer auditor/censor plus writer support.

cases.input_text: Use a tool to gather sources, then explain the answer clearly.
cases.notes: Tool-use plus writing should favor scout then muse.
Simple generalist traffic should stay on the strategist fallback lane.

claim_boundary: This lab suite expands task heterogeneity for router-shadow experiments only. It is not a counted comparator suite and cannot stand in for R5 proof.
